result.reason: Keyboard shortcuts are conflicting with national keyboard mappings, impacting usability for non-US users.
result.approach: Investigate how System.Windows.Forms.Keys interacts with different keyboard layouts. Implement a more robust input handling mechanism that correctly interprets keyboard input regardless of layout, potentially using InputLanguage or similar classes. Alternatively, provide a user-configurable shortcut remapping feature. Ensure any changes are reflected in the KeyboardShortcutsWindow.
